'''Kerritamba Village''' was one of the ground-level [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[City/Legends|settlements]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==History==
Kerritamba Village was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="Galaxies" /> Unlike most cities on Kashyyyk, it was on the forest floor and not in a [[Wroshyr tree/Legends|wroshyr tree]].<ref name="Databank">[[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk's]] [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]]</ref> The people of the village had charged themselves with protecting the native [[Kkowir Forest/Legends|Kkowir Forest]] and the [[Great Tree (Kashyyyk)|Great Tree]] from the dark powers of the [[Sayormi]] [[Species/Legends|species]] for many generations.<ref name="Galaxies" />

At the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Kerritamba]] was in charge of the village. During his tenure, the Great Tree became poisoned by the Sayormi, and he tasked an individual from outside the village with gathering the resources he needed to make a cure. After doing this, he tasked the individual with attacking the Sayormi.<ref name="Galaxies" />

==Notable residents==
*[[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Kerritamba]]
*[[Athnalu]]
*[[Wirartu]]
*[[Warchief]] [[Naloriss]]

==Behind the scenes==
Kerritamba Village first appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' prior to the game's closure on [[December 15]], 2011. It was later mentioned in the [[2010]] [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (novelization)|novelization]] of ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]''.
